allow: PowerShell(where.exe python 2>$null; where.exe python3 2>$null; where.exe conda 2>$null; $env:PATH -split ";" | Where-Object { $_ -match "python|conda|miniconda|anaconda" -and \(Test-Path $_\) })
PowerShell(where.exe uv 2>$null; where.exe uvx 2>$null; where.exe pipx 2>$null; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin\\uv.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)
